name: Red Onion Relish
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and seed the tomatoes, then cut into 1/8-inch dice.
2. Seed and cut the green bell pepper into 1/8-inch dice.
3. Cut the red onion into 1/8-inch dice.
4. Combine the diced tomato, pepper, and onion in a bowl.
5. Add vinegar to cover the mixture.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Chill the relish (can be prepared up to one day ahead).
8. A few hours before serving, drain well if needed.
9. Serve chilled or at room temperature.
